falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above its 200-day moving average by 3.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish trend reversal, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and 'bottom' pattern assumption

falsification_conditions.condition: Crude oil futures trade above $85/barrel for 5 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained high energy prices would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern by showing continued demand/supply imbalances

falsification_conditions.condition: The U.S. Federal Reserve announces a 50bps rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would directly contradict the 'blowoff' score implication of tightening monetary policy, proving the pattern match incorrect

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
